messages.speaker: Alice
messages.content: Hi Bob! How was your trip to Paris last week?

messages.speaker: Bob
messages.content: It was amazing! I visited the Eiffel Tower and the Louvre.

messages.speaker: Alice
messages.content: That sounds wonderful! Did you try any French food?

messages.speaker: Bob
messages.content: Yes! I had croissants every morning and tried escargot.

messages.speaker: Alice
messages.content: Escargot? That's adventurous! I could never eat snails.

messages.speaker: Bob
messages.content: It was actually delicious! I also bought some macarons from Ladurée.

messages.speaker: Alice
messages.content: Hey Bob, I'm planning my own trip to Europe.

messages.speaker: Bob
messages.content: That's exciting! Where are you thinking of going?

messages.speaker: Alice
messages.content: I'm considering Italy. I've always wanted to see Rome.

messages.speaker: Bob
messages.content: Rome is beautiful! You should definitely visit the Colosseum.

messages.speaker: Alice
messages.content: I heard the pizza there is incredible too.

messages.speaker: Bob
messages.content: Absolutely! Much better than what we have here.

messages.speaker: Alice
messages.content: I booked my trip to Rome! Going next month.

messages.speaker: Bob
messages.content: Congratulations! How long will you be there?

messages.speaker: Alice
messages.content: Just five days, but I'll try to see as much as possible.

messages.speaker: Bob
messages.content: Make sure to visit the Vatican too. The Sistine Chapel is breathtaking.

messages.speaker: Alice
messages.content: Good idea! By the way, did you keep in touch with anyone from Paris?

messages.speaker: Bob
messages.content: Yes, I met a tour guide named Pierre. We still chat sometimes.

questions.question: What landmarks did Bob visit in Paris?
questions.answer: The Eiffel Tower and the Louvre

questions.question: Where is Alice planning to travel?
Did Bob visit Paris before or after Alice started planning her trip?
Who did Bob meet during his trip that he still keeps in touch with?
What food did Bob say Alice should try, based on his own experience with local cuisine?
questions.answer: Bob recommended pizza in Rome, having experienced good local food in Paris

questions.question: Does Alice like escargot?
questions.answer: No, she said she could never eat snails

questions.question: What is a common activity tourists do in both cities mentioned?
questions.answer: Visit famous landmarks and try local food

questions.question: How long will Alice's trip to Rome be?
What happened first: Bob buying macarons or Alice booking her trip?
